title: Checkout toasts and earlier-version notice
summary: Snapshot checkout feedback now uses Sonner success and error toasts, and the top bar shows a subtle notice when the checked-out product state is behind the latest recorded snapshot.
userVisibleChange: Users get toast feedback after checkout attempts and can see when they are viewing an earlier product version.

risks.title: Config freshness depends on polling
risks.mitigation: The earlier-version notice refetches config periodically and checkout actions invalidate the config query immediately.

timeline.title: Added Sonner toaster support to the app shell
Moved checkout results from inline terminal blocks into success and error toasts
Exposed current and latest Git state through the UI config API
Added a subtle top-bar notice for earlier product versions
Verified UI build, Go tests, and diff checks

decisions.title: Use config polling for product-version awareness
decisions.rationale: The top bar already has global app context, and periodic config refresh keeps the notice simple without introducing a push channel.

artifacts.description: Checkout result area that is replaced by toast feedback.
